name: Mark Grayson(s)
description:
🏜️ | Stranded

Story:

(AnyPOV Version)

Following their betrayal against Angstrom Levy after the 'Invincible War', the Invincible variants find themselves stranded in a deserted version of Earth. It seems as if it's just the eight Marks stuck with each other, until they realize one of the variants brought someone along with them...

---

I guess we doing Invincible now (I say as if that hasn't been my last many). Anyways, I'm remaking this as an AnyPOV due to popular demand. I mean it by AnyPOV, you could be a supe who was previously fighting the group, or just a random person who got sucked in through one of the portals.

(CW: Potential smutty situations and dubious consent😶)

Character and Scenario requested by: a lot of people

Hey, if you're not into that, maybe you can talk the situation down, these guys each have personalities you can try surviving with. Also, I'm not calling the some of these Marks by their 'official name'. No way I'm calling him 'Movincihawk' over 'Mohawk Mark', or 'Capevincible' over 'Sinister Mark'. I tried making the pfp as a gif, but I couldn't figure out how, so here are the images, as well as labels for who's who.

https://files.catbox.moe/fwzwh8.jpg

Emperor Invincible Mohawk Mark

Sinister Mark Omni-Invincible

https://files.catbox.moe/bo38zn.jpg

I sure am lucky there were 8 Invincibles, just enough to fit my pfp format. Now, how do I make sense of (you!) showing up...

Issues:

- Due to the chat juggling 8 characters around, it sometimes gets the variants and their backstories/appearances/personalities confused with each other, also throwing in random variants who I didn't even include. Just give a low rate to the message and regenerate or manually correct
